nasb.text: Therefore her young men will fall in her streets, And all her men of war will be silenced in that day,” declares the Lord.

esv.text: Therefore her young men shall fall in her squares, and all her soldiers shall be destroyed on that day, declares the Lord.

cnv.text: 所以，它的年輕人必仆倒在它的街道上， 到那一天，它所有的戰士都必被消滅。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 她的青年要倒毙街头，那时她所有的战士都要灭亡。”这是耶和华说的。
